creator: peter.schuller@infidyne.com
text:
> There is a minor problem with the latest patch. =C2=A0PLIST_FILES needs t=
o be
> updated so it just has "clojure.jar" (since that is where it's now
> installed) rather than clojure-1.4.0.jar.
>
> I've made that change locally.
>
> Maintainer (Peter), do you have any objection to this patch being
> committed?

No, but I have not been able to look at it / test it. Feel free to
de-maintainer me. Unfortunately I have not had the time to maintain
any ports in a while, nor do I have a FreeBSD system to test on
anymore.

--=20
/ Peter Schuller (@scode, http://worldmodscode.wordpress.com)
